testCase.name: Overview Component Rendering Tests should render the main title and subtitle correctly
Overview Component Rendering Tests should render the information section title
Overview Component Rendering Tests should render all field labels
Overview Component Rendering Tests should render OverviewProductionSection component
Overview Component Rendering Tests should render footer paper element
Overview Component User Data Display Tests should display user data with tooltips when data is available and truncated
Overview Component User Data Display Tests should display truncated text in the UI when text exceeds max length
Overview Component User Data Display Tests should display short text without truncation
Overview Component Empty Data Handling Tests should display empty data placeholder when user data is null
Overview Component Empty Data Handling Tests should display empty data placeholder when user object exists but fields are empty
Overview Component Empty Data Handling Tests should handle partially filled user data
Overview Component Function Calls Tests should call fetchUserFromLocalStorage on component mount
Overview Component Function Calls Tests should call truncateString for each field with data
Overview Component Function Calls Tests should not call truncateString for empty fields

testCase.name: test suite for useTCAgreement hook Initial load scenarios should set acceptedTOS to false when getPortalConsent returns data

ProductDataGrid Rendering and States renders loading state initially
ProductDataGrid Rendering and States renders products table when data is loaded
ProductDataGrid Rendering and States renders empty state when no products
ProductDataGrid User Types and Roles calls getProducts with org_id for regular user
ProductDataGrid User Types and Roles calls getProducts with institutionId for Invitalia user
ProductDataGrid User Types and Roles shows action buttons for Invitalia user with selections
ProductDataGrid Filtering opens and closes filters drawer
ProductDataGrid Sorting and Pagination handles sorting
ProductDataGrid Product Detail Drawer opens and closes detail drawer
ProductDataGrid Error Handling handles API errors gracefully
ProductDataGrid Error Handling handles batch filter API errors
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage shows the Supervised action button for Invitalia L1 when selected rows contain no supervised items
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage disables Wait Approved for Invitalia L1 when a selected row is already WAIT_APPROVED
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage opens ProductModal for Invitalia L1 when status checks pass for SUPERVISED action
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage opens Confirm dialog for WAIT_APPROVED flow and handles confirm + success messages
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage shows mix-status error when status checks fail, then hides it after timeout
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage shows "yourself approved" error for Invitalia L2 when someUploaded is true
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage renders a filter chip automatically for Invitalia L2 (admin default status) and shows pagination label
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage opens and closes the Filters drawer and applies filtering (setFiltering)
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage handles sorting and paginated label rendering
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage opens and closes the Detail drawer via ProductsTable callback
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage gracefully handles getBatchFilterList API error path without breaking the table
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage does not render action buttons when no selection
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage renders WAIT_APPROVED message result when ProductModal success triggers WAIT_APPROVED for L1
ProductDataGrid – extra coverage handleOpenModalWithStatusCheck returns early when no selected rows

Layout component renders correctly with /products route

Layout component renders correctly with /uploads route
Layout component renders correctly with a non-matched route (e.g. /privacy-policy)

Layout component hides assistance info when on a nested /assistance route
Layout component shows assistance info when not on /assistance route

Layout component calls customExitAction when Footer exit is triggered
Layout component clears only filter, user, and token items from sessionStorage on exit
Layout component does not remove other keys from localStorage
Layout component does not remove other keys from sessionStorage
Layout component removes items with keys starting with "persist:"
Layout component removes items with keys containing "filter" (case insensitive)

OverviewProductionSection renders empty data state

withLogin Decorator Component Wrapping should return a wrapped component
withLogin Decorator Component Wrapping should set correct displayName for wrapped component
withLogin Decorator Component Wrapping should handle component without displayName
withLogin Decorator Component Wrapping should handle anonymous component
withLogin Decorator User Authentication Flow should render wrapped component when user is logged in
withLogin Decorator User Authentication Flow should not render wrapped component when user is not logged in
withLogin Decorator User Authentication Flow should attempt silent login when user is not logged in
withLogin Decorator User Authentication Flow should not attempt silent login when user is already logged in
withLogin Decorator Loading State Management should initialize useLoading with correct task name
withLogin Decorator Loading State Management should set loading to true before login attempt
withLogin Decorator Loading State Management should set loading to false after successful login
withLogin Decorator Loading State Management should call setLoading in correct order
withLogin Decorator Props Forwarding should forward props to wrapped component
withLogin Decorator Props Forwarding should forward multiple props to wrapped component
withLogin Decorator useEffect Dependencies should only run effect once on mount
withLogin Decorator Edge Cases should handle undefined user
withLogin Decorator Edge Cases should handle null user
withLogin Decorator Edge Cases should handle async login that resolves after component unmounts
withLogin Decorator Integration Tests should complete full authentication flow
withLogin Decorator Integration Tests should skip authentication flow when user is already logged in

UploadsTable renders error state
UploadsTable renders table with data
UploadsTable handles product link click

InstitutionsTable renders loading state
InstitutionsTable renders error state
InstitutionsTable renders no data message
InstitutionsTable renders institutions data
InstitutionsTable calls onRequestSort when header is clicked
InstitutionsTable navigates to institution products when institution name is clicked
ProductModal renders null if selectedProducts is missing or empty
ProductModal renders SUPERVISED modal with correct texts and char counter
ProductModal SUPERVISED: validation error on empty reason
ProductModal SUPERVISED: char counter updates while typing
ProductModal SUPERVISED: successful flow calls API, closes, updates table, calls onSuccess
ProductModal SUPERVISED: error flow closes but does not update table or call onSuccess
ProductModal SUPERVISED: Cancel button and Close icon call onClose
ProductModal REJECTED: renders dedicated UI, validates both fields, calls API, closes, updates table, calls onSuccess
ProductModal REJECTED: error flow closes but does not update table or call onSuccess
ProductModal REJECTED: validation with spaces only shows error
ProductModal REJECTED: validation with less than 2 chars shows min length error
ProductModal REJECTED: error on both fields shows both errors
ProductModal REJECT_APPROVATION: renders, validates, calls API, closes, updates table, calls onSuccess
ProductModal REJECT_APPROVATION: validation error on empty
ProductModal REJECT_APPROVATION: error flow closes but does not update table or call onSuccess
ProductModal ACCEPT_APPROVATION: renders, calls API, closes, updates table, calls onSuccess
ProductModal ACCEPT_APPROVATION: error flow closes but does not update table or call onSuccess
ProductModal state resets when modal reopens (open prop effect)
ProductModal renders without actionType: shows textbox
ProductModal renders correct texts for each actionType
FormAddProducts Rendering and Initial State renders correctly with initial state
FormAddProducts Rendering and Initial State renders with all props passed to FileUploadSection

FormAddProducts Template filename logic shows eprel template for non-cookinghobs category

FormAddProducts Category validation shows validation error when category is touched but empty
FormAddProducts Category validation clears validation error when valid category is selected

FormAddProducts Ref and validateForm validateForm returns false with invalid category
FormAddProducts Ref and validateForm validateForm returns false with valid category but no file accepted
FormAddProducts Ref and validateForm validateForm returns true with valid category and accepted file

FormAddProducts File operations handles download report error

FormAddProducts File operations dismisses error correctly

FormAddProducts Dropzone callbacks handles onFileDialogOpen with valid category

FormAddProducts Dropzone callbacks handles onDropRejected callback

FormAddProducts Dropzone callbacks handles onDropAccepted with valid category - error response
FormAddProducts Dropzone callbacks handles onDropAccepted with valid category - network error

FormAddProducts Input click handling handles input click with valid category

FormAddProducts Continue button functionality handles continue with valid category but no file
FormAddProducts Continue button functionality handles continue with valid form and file - success

FormAddProducts Continue button functionality handles continue with network error

FormAddProducts Edge cases and complete coverage handles multiple error scenarios in sequence

FormAddProducts Edge cases and complete coverage handles formik validation states correctly
FormAddProducts Edge cases and complete coverage covers all FileUploadSection props
FormAddProducts Edge cases and complete coverage ensures useImperativeHandle dependency array is covered

FormAddProducts Edge cases and complete coverage covers formik enableReinitialize and validateOnMount
FormAddProducts Edge cases and complete coverage handles all error clearing scenarios
FiltersDrawer renders header and close button; clicking close closes the drawer
FiltersDrawer shows "producer" Select when user is INVITALIA
FiltersDrawer hides "producer" Select when user is NOT INVITALIA
FiltersDrawer changes status via Select (draft only) and does not apply until "filter" click
FiltersDrawer changes batch via Select (draft only) and applies on "filter" click
FiltersDrawer changes category via Select (draft only) and applies on "filter" click
FiltersDrawer types in eprel/gtin inputs and applies setters on "filter" click (trimmed by helper)
FiltersDrawer enables "filter" button when at least one draft differs from applied
FiltersDrawer delete filters resets drafts, calls delete callback, resets page and closes
FiltersDrawer filter button is disabled when no draft differs from applied (all empty)
FiltersDrawer shows error for non-numeric EPREL and clears error on change
FiltersDrawer delete filters button is enabled when errorStatus=true even if no interaction/filters
FiltersDrawer shows error for invalid GTIN and clears error on paste
FiltersDrawer batch select renders all provided options
FiltersDrawer category select shows exactly PRODUCTS_CATEGORY keys
FiltersDrawer onClose of Drawer triggers toggleFiltersDrawer(false)
getChipColor (real constants, no mock) returns expected colors for each known status
getChipColor (real constants, no mock) returns default for unknown/null/undefined
FiltersDrawer – validations & actions accepts valid EPREL/GTIN values, applies filters and closes the drawer
FiltersDrawer – validations & actions onPaste removes spaces for EPREL and allows filtering
FiltersDrawer – status filter by role hides WAIT_APPROVED and SUPERVISED for non-Invitalia users
FiltersDrawer – onClose draft reset restores drafts to applied filters when the Drawer is closed
getChipColor (real constants, no mock) – correct expectations matches the real map
getChipColor (real constants, no mock) – correct expectations returns default for unknown values
FilterBar should render all filter elements
FilterBar should have filter and delete buttons disabled when no filters are set
FilterBar should enable filter button when category filter is set
FilterBar should enable filter button when status filter is set
FilterBar should enable filter button when batch filter is set
FilterBar should enable filter button when eprel code filter is set
FilterBar should enable filter button when gtin code filter is set
FilterBar should enable delete button when errorStatus is true even with no filters
FilterBar should call setCategoryFilter when category select changes
FilterBar should call setStatusFilter when status select changes
FilterBar should call setBatchFilter when batch select changes
FilterBar should call setEprelCodeFilter when eprel code input changes
FilterBar should call setGtinCodeFilter when gtin code input changes
FilterBar should call setFiltering when filter button is clicked
FilterBar should call handleDeleteFiltersButtonClick when delete filters button is clicked
FilterBar should render all category options in select
FilterBar should render all status options in select
FilterBar should render all batch options in select
FilterBar should handle empty batchFilterItems array
FilterBar should handle null/undefined batchFilterItems
FilterBar should display current filter values
FilterBar should apply correct styling and layout
FilterBar should have correct button heights and min widths
ProductDetail.extra renders chronology + formalMotivation blocks when present (non OPERATORE)
ProductDetail.extra Invitalia L1 + SUPERVISED: shows accept/reject buttons; confirm approve calls waitApproved API and waitApproved message
ProductDetail.extra Invitalia L1 + UPLOADED: open Supervised modal then close (not cancelled) triggers onUpdateTable/onClose; success triggers onShowSupervisedMsg
ProductDetail.extra Invitalia L2 + WAIT_APPROVED: shows AcceptApprovation and RejectApprovation flows
ProductDetail.extra Confirm dialog approve on UPLOADED calls waitApproved API and shows waitApproved (prefers onShowWaitApprovedMsg over onShowApprovedMsg)
ProductDetail.extra Exclude flow (L1 + UPLOADED): opening and success triggers onShowRejectedMsg via handleSuccess
ProductDetail.extra does NOT render motivation blocks when OPERATORE user
ProductDetail.extra does NOT render formalMotivation when empty or status not REJECTED for OPERATORE
ProductDetail.extra handleSuccess does nothing when no message callbacks are provided
ProductDetail.extra Confirm dialog fallback: if no onShowWaitApprovedMsg, uses onShowApprovedMsg
ProductDetail.extra Modal close with cancelled=true does NOT trigger onUpdateTable/onClose

EnhancedTableHead Rendering should render table head without checkbox when isInvitaliaUser is false
EnhancedTableHead Rendering should render with empty headCells array
EnhancedTableHead Checkbox behavior should render checkbox as checked when isAllSelected is true
EnhancedTableHead Checkbox behavior should render checkbox as indeterminate when isIndeterminate is true
EnhancedTableHead Checkbox behavior should render checkbox as unchecked when both isAllSelected and isIndeterminate are false
EnhancedTableHead Checkbox behavior should call handleSelectAllClick when checkbox is clicked
EnhancedTableHead Sorting behavior should render sort labels for sortable columns
EnhancedTableHead Sorting behavior should not render sort label for selectedStatus column
EnhancedTableHead Sorting behavior should call onRequestSort when sort label is clicked
EnhancedTableHead Sorting behavior should show active sort state for current orderBy column
EnhancedTableHead Sorting behavior should render visually hidden sort direction text for active column - descending
EnhancedTableHead Sorting behavior should render visually hidden sort direction text for active column - ascending
EnhancedTableHead Sorting behavior should not render visually hidden text for non-active columns
EnhancedTableHead Cell alignment and styling should apply correct alignment for left-aligned cells
EnhancedTableHead Cell alignment and styling should apply correct alignment for center-aligned cells
EnhancedTableHead Cell alignment and styling should apply correct alignment for right-aligned cells
EnhancedTableHead Cell alignment and styling should apply cellLeftSx styling to left-aligned cells
EnhancedTableHead Cell alignment and styling should apply cellCenterSx styling to center-aligned cells
EnhancedTableHead Cell alignment and styling should apply cellRightSx styling to right-aligned cells
EnhancedTableHead Cell alignment and styling should apply width styles to cells
EnhancedTableHead Cell alignment and styling should apply width styles to checkbox cell from first headCell
EnhancedTableHead Edge cases should handle missing cellSx props
EnhancedTableHead Edge cases should handle headCells without width property
EnhancedTableHead Edge cases should handle empty first headCell when isInvitaliaUser is true
EnhancedTableHead Edge cases should render final empty TableCell
EnhancedTableHead Edge cases should handle different ProductDTO key types
EnhancedTableHead Edge cases should handle click on different sortable columns

AddProducts Component renders form section correctly
AddProducts Component handles file upload interaction
AddProducts Component displays correct breadcrumb structure
AddProducts Component component handles theme correctly
AddProducts Component accessibility attributes are present
AddProducts Component handles back button click and navigation
AddProducts Component handles back button click when onExit does not execute callback
AddProducts Component formRef is properly connected to FormAddProducts
AddProducts Component passes correct props to FormAddProducts
AddProducts Component renders main container with correct data-testid

AddProducts Component manual link prevents default when EIE_MANUAL is empty string

InstitutionInfoCard renders the component with title
InstitutionInfoCard fetches and displays institution data successfully
InstitutionInfoCard displays truncated values with tooltips
InstitutionInfoCard displays "-" for empty values
InstitutionInfoCard handles API error gracefully

InstitutionInfoCard handles missing institutionId in store
InstitutionInfoCard constructs complete address correctly
InstitutionInfoCard handles partial address data
InstitutionInfoCard renders all field labels correctly
InstitutionInfoCard applies correct grid layout classes
UpcomingInitiative renderizza immagine 60x60, titolo, sottotitolo interpolato e bottone
UpcomingInitiative il click sul bottone invoca console.log con l’evento
ProductStatusChip quando status è undefined dovrebbe non renderizzare nulla
ProductStatusChip quando status è null (coercizione a undefined) dovrebbe non renderizzare nulla
ProductStatusChip quando status è una stringa vuota dovrebbe non renderizzare nulla
ProductStatusChip quando status è "APPROVED" dovrebbe non renderizzare nulla
ProductStatusChip quando status è "REJECTED" dovrebbe renderizzare un chip di errore con icona ErrorIcon
ProductStatusChip quando status è "REJECTED" dovrebbe avere le corrette proprietà del chip
ProductStatusChip test di accessibilità dovrebbe renderizzare il chip REJECTED con struttura corretta
ProductStatusChip test di accessibilità dovrebbe avere testo accessibile per screen reader - REJECTED
ProductStatusChip test di rendering completo dovrebbe non renderizzare nulla per status undefined
ProductStatusChip test di rendering completo dovrebbe non renderizzare nulla per status APPROVED
ProductStatusChip test di rendering completo dovrebbe renderizzare struttura corretta per status REJECTED
ProductStatusChip test di rendering completo dovrebbe renderizzare struttura corretta per status warning
ProductStatusChip test di rendering completo dovrebbe applicare correttamente gli stili sx
NewFilter renders the button with translation text and icon
NewFilter calls onClick when provided
NewFilter does not throw when onClick is not provided
InvitaliaProductsList renders ProductGrid with institutionId
InvitaliaProductsList passes empty organizationId when institution is null
InvitaliaProductsList shows success MsgResult when INVITALIA_MSG_SHOW event is dispatched
InvitaliaProductsList hides MsgResult when INVITALIA_MSG_DISMISS event is dispatched
InvitaliaProductsList auto hides MsgResult after 10 seconds timeout
MessagePage renderizza il messaggio e non mostra il bottone se goBack è false
MessagePage renderizza il messaggio e mostra il bottone se goBack è true
MessagePage chiama onGoBack quando il bottone viene cliccato
ProductActionButtons Rendering conditions should return null when isInvitaliaUser is false
ProductActionButtons Rendering conditions should return null when status is undefined
ProductActionButtons Rendering conditions should return null when status is empty string
ProductActionButtons Rendering conditions should return null when both isInvitaliaUser is false and status is undefined
ProductActionButtons Non-REJECTED status (but not APPROVED) should render Ripristina and Escludi buttons when status is PENDING
ProductActionButtons Non-REJECTED status (but not APPROVED) should render Ripristina and Escludi buttons when status is DRAFT
ProductActionButtons Non-REJECTED status (but not APPROVED) should call onRestore when Ripristina button is clicked in non-REJECTED status
ProductActionButtons Non-REJECTED status (but not APPROVED) should call onExclude when Escludi button is clicked in non-REJECTED status
ProductActionButtons REJECTED status should render only Ripristina button when status is REJECTED
ProductActionButtons REJECTED status should call onRestore when Ripristina button is clicked in REJECTED status
ProductActionButtons Component structure and styling should render with correct MUI components structure for APPROVED status
ProductActionButtons Component structure and styling should render with correct MUI components structure for REJECTED status
ProductActionButtons Edge cases should handle unknown status values as non-REJECTED
ProductActionButtons Edge cases should handle case-sensitive status comparison
EprelLinks renderizza il link se eprelCode è valido
EprelLinks renderizza solo Typography con emptyData se eprelCode è stringa vuota
EprelLinks renderizza stringa vuota se linkEprel è null
EprelLinks renderizza solo Typography con emptyData se eprelCode è undefined
EprelLinks renderizza solo Typography con emptyData se eprelCode è null
Test suite for SideNavItem component renders without crashing
Test suite for SideNavItem component Testing rendering of SideMenu component
FileUploadSection renders loading state
FileUploadSection renders accepted file state
FileUploadSection renders rejected file alert if fileRejected and alert info are present
FileUploadSection renders dropzone and InitUploadBox
FileUploadSection renders helper text and download link when category is selected
FileUploadSection calls onInputClick when input is clicked
App routing and gating renders Auth page at /auth (top-level route)
App routing and gating shows TOSWall inside TOSLayout when TOS not accepted (and not on /privacy or /tos)
App routing and gating returns empty fragment when TOS status is undefined (and not on /privacy or /tos)
App routing and gating allows navigating to Privacy and TOS pages even if TOS not accepted
App routing and gating renders Invitalia routes when user is Invitalia (HOME and PRODUCERS, and * redirect)
App routing and gating renders Standard routes when user is standard; passes organizationId from store; covers * redirect
useLogin hook userFromJwtToken should correctly convert JWT token to User object
useLogin hook userFromJwtTokenAsJWTUser should correctly convert JWT token to IDPayUser object
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle mock user scenario
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should redirect to login when no token is present
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle empty session storage user
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should use existing session storage user
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle getUserPermission success in mock scenario
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle getUserPermission error in mock scenario
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle getUserPermission error with empty session storage
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle getUserPermission error with existing session storage user
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle empty string token
useLogin hook attemptSilentLogin should handle undefined token
useLogin hook hook return value should return attemptSilentLogin function
withSelectedParty Decorator Decorator Functionality should call withRetrievedValue with correct parameters
withSelectedParty Decorator Decorator Functionality should return a component
withSelectedParty Decorator Component Rendering should render wrapped component with party prop
withSelectedParty Decorator Component Rendering should forward additional props to wrapped component
withSelectedParty Decorator Type Safety should omit party prop from component props type
withSelectedParty Decorator Type Safety should accept component with only party prop
withSelectedParty Decorator Type Safety should accept component with party and additional props
withSelectedParty Decorator Integration with withRetrievedValue should pass useSelectedParty hook to withRetrievedValue
withSelectedParty Decorator Integration with withRetrievedValue should use "party" as the property key
withSelectedParty Decorator Integration with withRetrievedValue should pass the original component to withRetrievedValue
withSelectedParty Decorator Different Party Scenarios should handle party with minimal required fields
withSelectedParty Decorator Different Party Scenarios should handle party with all optional fields
withSelectedParty Decorator Different Party Scenarios should handle party with different statuses
withSelectedParty Decorator Component Display Name should work with components that have displayName
withSelectedParty Decorator Component Display Name should work with anonymous components
withSelectedParty Decorator Multiple Instances should allow wrapping multiple different components
withSelectedParty Decorator WithSelectedPartyProps Type should define party prop correctly
withSelectedParty Decorator WithSelectedPartyProps Type should require party prop
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Decorator Composition should call withRetrievedValue with correct parameters
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Decorator Composition should call withSelectedParty after withRetrievedValue
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Decorator Composition should pass result of withRetrievedValue to withSelectedParty
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Decorator Composition should return the result of withSelectedParty
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Component Rendering should render wrapped component with party and products props
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Component Rendering should forward additional props to wrapped component
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Component Rendering should handle empty products array
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Type Safety should omit party and products props from component props type
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Type Safety should accept component with only required props
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Different Products Scenarios should handle single product
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Different Products Scenarios should handle products with different statuses
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Integration with Hooks should use useSelectedPartyProducts hook
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Integration with Hooks should use "products" as the property key
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Multiple Instances should allow wrapping multiple different components
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator WithSelectedPartyProductsProps Type should define party and products props correctly
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator WithSelectedPartyProductsProps Type should require both party and products props
withSelectedPartyProducts Decorator Decorator Chain Order should apply decorators in correct order (withRetrievedValue then withSelectedParty)
Product Service uploadProductList should upload product list successfully
Product Service uploadProductList should handle error and return empty object
Product Service uploadProductList should handle non-Error objects
Product Service uploadProductListVerify should verify product list successfully
Product Service uploadProductListVerify should handle error and return empty object
Product Service downloadErrorReport should download error report successfully
Product Service downloadErrorReport should handle error and return empty data
Product Service getProductFilesList should get product files list successfully with pagination
Product Service getProductFilesList should handle error and return empty list
Product Service getProductFilesList should call without pagination parameters
Product Service getProducts should get products successfully with all parameters
Product Service getProducts should get products with minimal parameters
Product Service getProducts should handle null response and return default object
Product Service getProducts should handle error and return empty list
Product Service getInstitutionsList should get institutions list successfully
Product Service getInstitutionsList should handle error and return empty institutions list
Product Service getInstitutionById should get institution by id successfully
Product Service getInstitutionById should handle error and return empty object
Product Service setSupervisionedStatusList should set supervised status successfully
Product Service setSupervisionedStatusList should handle error and return empty object
Product Service setApprovedStatusList should set approved status successfully
Product Service setApprovedStatusList should handle error
Product Service setWaitApprovedStatusList should set wait approved status successfully
Product Service setWaitApprovedStatusList should handle error
Product Service setRejectedStatusList should set rejected status successfully
Product Service setRejectedStatusList should handle error
Product Service setRestoredStatusList should set restored status successfully
Product Service setRestoredStatusList should handle error
Product Service getBatchFilterList should get batch filter list successfully
Product Service getBatchFilterList should handle error and return empty array
Product Service Error logging with different error types should log error with message property
Product Service Error logging with different error types should log error with stack property
Product Service Error logging with different error types should log error with response status and statusText
Product Service Error logging with different error types should log error with response data
Product Service Error logging with different error types should log error with config url and method
Product Service Error logging with different error types should not log when DEBUG_CONSOLE is false
Product Service Error handling with array response data should handle error with array response data
Product Service should log error key when present
Product Service should not log anything when DEBUG_CONSOLE is false
Product Service should handle complex error object structures in pretty()
Product Service should log when response data has more than 5 keys
Product Service should handle config without url or method gracefully
Product Service should extract error message and stack properly
Product Service should handle primitive types in pretty()
usa la lingua dalla querystring e chiama i18n.changeLanguage
se la querystring non ha lang usa i18n.language e chiama changeLanguage
link cookie pre-login invoca OneTrust.ToggleInfoDisplay
postLoginLinks aprono finestre esterne con focus dove previsto
onExit di default esegue la exitAction
onExit custom viene chiamato con una funzione exitAction
Products rende il ProductDataGrid con l’organizationId passato
Products non rende i children (il componente non li supporta)
sanitizeHeaders sets Authorization header when a token is present
sanitizeHeaders does NOT set Authorization header when token is empty string
sanitizeHeaders does NOT set Authorization header when token is null/undefined
sanitizeHeaders removes headers with null values
sanitizeHeaders removes headers with 'undefined' string values
sanitizeHeaders removes headers with empty string values
sanitizeHeaders keeps headers with valid non-empty values
sanitizeHeaders returns the modified config object
response interceptor success handler passes the response through unchanged
response interceptor error handler - 401 dispatches addError action
response interceptor error handler - 401 deletes the user storage
response interceptor error handler - 401 redirects to the login page
response interceptor error handler - 401 rejects the promise with the original error
response interceptor error handler - non-401 does NOT dispatch addError for non-401 errors
response interceptor error handler - non-401 does NOT redirect for non-401 errors
response interceptor error handler - non-401 still rejects the promise
RolePermissionApi userPermission returns the API response on success
RolePermissionApi userPermission returns empty object and logs error on failure
RolePermissionApi getPortalConsent returns the API response on success
RolePermissionApi getPortalConsent returns empty object and logs error on failure
RolePermissionApi savePortalConsent calls the API with the given versionId
RolePermissionApi savePortalConsent works when versionId is undefined
RolePermissionApi savePortalConsent returns undefined and logs error on failure
RegisterApi.getProduct returns the first item when content is non-empty
RegisterApi.getProduct returns undefined when content array is empty
RegisterApi.getProduct returns undefined when content is missing
RegisterApi.getProduct returns undefined when value is missing
RegisterApi.getProduct returns fallback object on API error
RegisterApi.getProductList returns the API response on success
RegisterApi.getProductList returns fallback on error
RegisterApi.getProductFiles returns the API response on success
RegisterApi.getProductFiles returns fallback object on error
RegisterApi.getBatchFilterItems sets x-organization-selected param when org is non-empty
RegisterApi.getBatchFilterItems does NOT set x-organization-selected when org is empty string
RegisterApi.getBatchFilterItems returns the response directly when it is already an array
RegisterApi.getBatchFilterItems returns empty array on API error
RegisterApi.uploadProductList returns API response on success
RegisterApi.uploadProductList returns empty object and logs error on failure
RegisterApi.uploadProductListVerify returns API response on success
RegisterApi.uploadProductListVerify returns empty object and logs error on failure
RegisterApi.downloadErrorReport returns data and empty filename when response has a top-level data string
RegisterApi.downloadErrorReport returns empty data when top-level data string is blank
RegisterApi.downloadErrorReport extracts filename from content-disposition header (lowercase)
RegisterApi.downloadErrorReport extracts filename from content-disposition header (capitalized)
RegisterApi.downloadErrorReport extracts filename via headers.get() method
RegisterApi.downloadErrorReport returns empty filename when no content-disposition header is present
RegisterApi.downloadErrorReport reads csv from rawResponse.data when top-level data is empty
RegisterApi.getInstitutionsList returns the API response on success
RegisterApi.getInstitutionsList returns fallback on error
RegisterApi.getInstitutionById calls the API with the correct institutionId
RegisterApi.getInstitutionById returns fallback on error
initiative Summary slice initiative Summary slice actions
initiative Summary slice initiative Summary slice slectors
ProductDataGrid.helpers getSelectedStatuses filters and preserves order
ProductDataGrid.helpers isAllStatus works for true and false
ProductDataGrid.helpers isSomeStatus works for true and false
ProductDataGrid.helpers getStatusChecks detects allUploaded, allSupervised, allWaitApproved, someUploaded and length
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: APPROVED when all UPLOADED
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: WAIT_APPROVED when all UPLOADED
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: SUPERVISED when all UPLOADED shows waitApproved message
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: Invitalia WAIT_APPROVED when all SUPERVISED
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: Invitalia APPROVED when all SUPERVISED
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: Invitalia REJECTED with all UPLOADED resets all messages
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: REJECTED or REJECT_APPROVATION shows rejected when not covered by earlier branches
ProductDataGrid.helpers handleModalSuccess: default path sets approved when no branch matches
Helper functions formattedCurrency with undefined
Helper functions formattedCurrency with number (no cents)
Helper functions formattedCurrency with number and cents = true
Helper functions formatDate with undefined
Helper functions formatDate with valid date
Helper functions formatIban with valid IBAN
Helper functions formatIban with undefined
Helper functions formatDateWithHours with valid ISO string
Helper functions formatDateWithoutHours with valid ISO string
Helper functions formatDateWithoutHours with empty string
Helper functions formatFileName with long name
Helper functions formatFileName with short name
Helper functions formatFileName with undefined
Helper functions truncateString with long string
Helper functions truncateString with short string
Helper functions truncateString with undefined

Additional tests for better coverage formattedCurrency with cents = false explicitly
Additional tests for better coverage formatDateWithHours with null
Additional tests for better coverage formatDateWithHours with undefined

Additional tests for better coverage truncateStringResponsive with undefined maxLength
Additional tests for better coverage truncateStringResponsive with string longer than maxLength
Additional tests for better coverage truncateStringResponsive with string shorter than maxLength

Additional tests for better coverage fetchUserFromLocalStorage with no user data
Additional tests for better coverage fetchUserFromLocalStorage with invalid JSON

Additional tests for better coverage initUploadHelperBoxStyle has correct properties
Additional tests for 100% coverage formatDateWithHours with empty string
Additional tests for 100% coverage formatDateWithHours with valid ISO string
Additional tests for 100% coverage formatDateWithHours with invalid date string
Additional tests for 100% coverage getTablePrLength with window defined
Additional tests for 100% coverage getTablePrLength without window
Additional tests for 100% coverage useResponsiveMaxLength with different breakpoints
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with undefined
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with empty string
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with future date
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with past date
Additional tests for 100% coverage isOnOrBeforeDate with today date
Additional tests for 100% coverage customExitAction clears storage and redirects
Additional tests for 100% coverage formattedCurrency with number 0 and cents true
Additional tests for 100% coverage formattedCurrency with custom symbol
categoryList should contain all expected categories with correct labels and values
downloadCsv should create a blob with BOM and trigger download with correct filename
downloadCsv supports plain string content
downloadCsv supports response string content
downloadCsv supports nested response data content
downloadCsv supports body string content
downloadCsv supports nested body data content
downloadCsv falls back to report.csv when filename is empty
downloadCsv warns and still downloads an empty csv when content is missing
downloadCsv removes the temporary link and revokes the object url
RolePermissionService getUserPermission calls API and returns data
RolePermissionService getPortalConsent calls API and returns data
RolePermissionService savePortalConsent calls API with versionId
store configuration usa i reducer corretti, applica persistReducer con la whitelist e disattiva il serializableCheck
store configuration include il logger quando LOG_REDUX_ACTIONS è true
